transcript: Speaker A: Excuse me, your dog has been barking non-stop since early this morning. Speaker B: Sorry, wo mein bahar gaya tha. I stop him. [Sorry, I had gone out. I'll stop him.] Speaker A: Please make sure he gets proper training so he does not bark. Speaker B: Okay, I train him. Speaker A: Sure, thanks for understanding. Speaker B: Aye, one question. How your English so good? Speaker A: Oh, thank you. I just practice with an AI teacher. Speaker B: Main unse kaise seekh sakta hoon? [How can I learn from them?] Speaker A: Just download MySivi app and practice with the AI teacher. Speaker B: But this costly, right? Speaker A: Not at all. Just 1 rupee mein shuru kar sakte ho. Agar acha laga, tabhi continue karo. Just 15 minutes daily practice karo and your English will be good. [Not at all. You can start for just 1 rupee. If you like it, only then continue. Just practice 15 minutes daily and your English will be good.] Speaker B: Ek number! Main abhi MySivi app download karta hoon. [Awesome! I will download the MySivi app right now.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Excuse me, your dog has been barking non-stop since early this morning. Sorry, wo mein bahar gaya tha. I stop him. Please make sure he gets proper training so he does not bark. Okay, I train him. Sure, thanks for understanding. Aye, one question. How your English so good? Oh, thank you. I just practice with an AI teacher. Main unse kaise seekh sakta hoon? Just download MySivi app and practice with the AI teacher. But this costly, right? Not at all. Just 1 rupee mein shuru kar sakte ho. Agar acha laga, tabhi continue karo. Just 15 minutes daily practice karo and your English will be good. Ek number! Main abhi MySivi app download karta hoon. MySivi Premium, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Install Now.
summary: An animated skit where a neighbor's fluent English inspires a dog owner to ask for learning tips. The neighbor recommends the MySivi app for its AI teacher, 15-minute daily practice, and a 3-day trial for ₹1. The ad concludes with a call to download the app.
